item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 6min The second meeting of the Sky Bet Sunday Series will not take place as planned after Ayr
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 6min The second meeting of the Sky Bet Sunday Series will not take place as planned after Ayr announced next weekend's fixture has been cancelled due to a waterlogged track De racingpost.com 2 822

At The Races @AtTheRaces · 8min Just Perth remains!
@DSkeltonRacing gets a first @plumptonraces winner for the season as Ballyeaston gains a first success in ready fashion... 3 1 mil

item.title: ChrisPoole___: Chris Poole @ChrisPoole___ · 23min Sick of these stupid fractions , just make it 2/11 . Cita Jurrien Timber @JurrienTimb
